name: African Union

colors.symbolism: the hope of Africa and Africa's vegetation

description: A wide green border surrounds a white centre. The white centre bears a gold map of Africa surrounded by a circle of small gold five-pointed stars.
history: The current flag of the African Union was selected from a design competition and adopted at the 14th AU Summit in Addis Ababa on 31 January 2010. It replaces the 2002 flag.

features.symbolism: the unity of the African continent
the member states of the African Union (the count was originally 53, now 55)
